name: donegate
description: Spec-driven delivery governance for AI-assisted software work through a canonical skill, MCP tools, and thin hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Track delivery tasks through specs, verification, docs, and projected lifecycle state.
interface.longDescription: DoneGate keeps AI-assisted delivery honest by combining a host skill for workflow doctrine, MCP tools for deterministic state changes, and hooks for lightweight session and git checks.
defaultPrompt: Use DoneGate to create, verify, document, and close the current task
